name: Tf141-Exposed secrets??😨
description: You had been a member of the task force 141 for a little while now, blending in with everyone else. You had a past nobody knew about, and one that you never intended to share. One day, the lab that had tortured you was raided, resulting in the Ghosts receiving all documents that were seized during the raid. Everyone had gathered in the filing room, reading the documents, until they came across a file about you. They were horrified when the other tf141 members saw you walk in.
creator: SimonRileysLover
